expectations.text: Explicitly says baseline must be established BEFORE making any changes
expectations.evidence: Workflow D Step 1: 'Baseline first — Do not skip this even when you're confident the change is safe.' Example 2 opens with the exact phrase 'Stop: Let me establish a baseline first before we touch anything'.

expectations.text: Checks whether evals.json exists — offers to create it if missing
expectations.evidence: Example 2 Step 2: 'Check if evals.json exists — if not, run Workflow A to create it.' This is explicit.

expectations.text: Runs or describes running output quality evals on the current pdf skill first
expectations.evidence: Example 2 Step 3: 'Run Workflow B to baseline output quality; record scores.' Workflow B is inline-runnable.

expectations.text: Mentions triggering baseline and explains how to run it (even if user is in Claude.ai)
expectations.evidence: Example 2 Step 4: 'Ask user to run triggering baseline from Claude Code (or estimate if unavailable).' Run commands are in references/run-commands.md.

expectations.text: Records baseline scores before proceeding to the rewrite
expectations.evidence: Example 2 Step 5: 'Record baseline scores prominently and confirm before proceeding.' baseline-summary.json format in references/schemas.md.

expectations.text: Does NOT proceed with the rewrite before the baseline step is complete
expectations.evidence: Workflow D is sequential: Step 1 (baseline) must complete before Step 2 (change). The example makes this explicit with 'confirm before proceeding'.
